summary: Comprehensive testing of ConstructMarket NEW Enterprise Features: 2FA (TOTP), File Uploads, WebSocket Chat, PDF Contract Export, Verification Badges, Push Notifications. Backend: 31/31 tests passed (100%). Frontend: 2FA Settings page working correctly with QR code generation. Tasks page accessible.

integration_issues.issue: Mixed Content warnings in browser console - HTTPS page making HTTP API requests. This appears to be browser-level caching issue since .env has correct HTTPS URL and API curl tests work with HTTPS.
integration_issues.root_cause: Possible browser cache or React dev server caching. The REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL in .env is correctly set to https://construct-market-5.preview.emergentagent.com

action_items: Investigate mixed content warnings - may need browser cache clear or hard refresh (Ctrl+Shift+R)
Consider adding link to Security Settings from main Settings page (currently only accessible via direct URL /settings/security)
critical_code_review_comments: All new enterprise APIs (2FA, Files, Chat, PDF, Badges, Push) are fully functional and properly authenticated
2FA implementation uses pyotp for TOTP and generates QR codes correctly
PDF export using WeasyPrint works correctly with proper PDF header (%PDF)
File upload validates file types and size limits correctly
WebSocket chat infrastructure is in place with proper authentication

success_rate.frontend: 90% (2FA page works, mixed content warning present)

seed_data_creation: Test files created during file upload tests, test push subscriptions created
context_for_next_testing_agent: NEW Enterprise features tested: (1) 2FA Setup - POST /api/2fa/setup returns QR code base64 and secret; (2) 2FA Verify - POST /api/2fa/verify validates TOTP code; (3) File Upload - POST /api/files/upload accepts images/PDFs; (4) Work Diary Photos - POST /api/files/work-diary/{work_order_id}/photos; (5) Chat Rooms - GET /api/chat/rooms; (6) Chat Messages - GET /api/chat/rooms/{room_id}/messages; (7) PDF Export - GET /api/contracts/{contract_id}/pdf returns real PDF; (8) User Badges - GET /api/users/{user_id}/badges; (9) Company Verification - GET /api/companies/{company_id}/verification-status; (10) Admin Badge Award - POST /api/admin/users/{user_id}/badges; (11) Push Subscribe - POST /api/notifications/subscribe. Frontend 2FA Settings page at /settings/security shows QR code and verification input.

work_diary_photos.upload_photos: PASSED - Multiple photos uploaded to work order
work_diary_photos.404_nonexistent_work_order: PASSED - Returns 404 for missing work order

chat_system.get_chat_rooms: PASSED - Returns list of rooms with contract context

pdf_contract_export.export_pdf: PASSED - Returns valid PDF file (starts with %PDF)

verification_badges.get_user_badges: PASSED - Returns badges array with badge_count

company_verification.get_verification_status: PASSED - Returns verification_score, trust_level, verifications array

admin_badge_award.admin_award_badge: PASSED - Admin can award badges to users
admin_badge_award.rejects_invalid_badge_type: PASSED - Returns 400 for invalid badge type

ui_tests.2fa_settings_page: PASSED - /settings/security shows 2FA card with Enable button
ui_tests.2fa_qr_code_display: PASSED - QR code displays after clicking Enable
ui_tests.2fa_manual_key_display: PASSED - Manual entry key shown with copy button
ui_tests.tasks_page: PASSED - Tasks page loads with Post New Task button

rca_of_the_issue: Mixed Content Warning: The browser console shows requests to http:// instead of https://. Root cause investigation: (1) .env file has correct HTTPS URL, (2) App.js correctly reads REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL, (3) Direct API calls with curl work over HTTPS. This suggests browser-level caching of old build artifacts. Mitigation: Hard refresh (Ctrl+Shift+R) or clear browser cache.
